markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Jared Golden wins the 2026 Maine Senate election, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: This market is eligible for accelerated determination after a consensus of media organizations project the winner. See full rules for details.
markets.title: Who will win the 2026 Maine Senate election?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Hamdi Fathi records at least 1 goal during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Argentina vs Egypt professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 7, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Argentina vs Egypt professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 7, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's goals scored.
markets.title: Hamdi Fathi: 1+ goals

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Nico Gonzalez records at least 1 goal during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Argentina vs Egypt professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 7, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Argentina vs Egypt professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 7, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's goals scored.
markets.title: Nico Gonzalez: 1+ goals

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Nico Gonzalez records the first goal for Argentina during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Argentina vs Egypt professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 7, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Argentina vs Egypt professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 7, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's goals scored. If the team's first goal of the match is an own goal, the market will resolve based on the next non-own-goal scored for that team.
markets.title: Nico Gonzalez: Argentina First Goalscorer

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Lautaro Martinez records the first goal for Argentina during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Argentina vs Egypt professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 7, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Argentina vs Egypt professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 7, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's goals scored. If the team's first goal of the match is an own goal, the market will resolve based on the next non-own-goal scored for that team.
markets.title: Lautaro Martinez: Argentina First Goalscorer

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Egypt records above 3.5 goals in the Argentina vs Egypt professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 7, 2026 after 90 minutes plus stoppage time (does not include extra time or penalties), then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to Egypt in the Argentina vs Egypt professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 7, 2026 after 90 minutes plus stoppage time (does not include extra time or penalties). Own goals count towards the team awarded the goal.
markets.title: Will Egypt score over 3.5 goals?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If over 6.5 goals are scored in the Argentina vs Egypt professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 7, 2026 after 90 minutes plus stoppage time (does not include extra time or penalties), then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.title: Will over 6.5 goals be scored?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Zack Wheeler records 9+ strikeouts in the Philadelphia vs Cincinnati professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 7, 2026 at 7:10 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Zack Wheeler is scratched or is not a starting pitcher, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Zack Wheeler is not a starting pitcher but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, relief appearances will not count towards this market.
If Zack Wheeler is a starting pitcher and records at least one pitch the market will settle based on strikeouts recorded.
markets.title: Zack Wheeler: 9+ strikeouts?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Chengyiyi Yuan wins the Nong vs Yuan professional tennis match in the 2026 W15 Luan Round of 32 after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Nong vs Yuan professional tennis match in the 2026 W15 Luan Round of 32 after a ball has been played. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), all markets will resolve to $0.50. If a player withdraws or forfeits after a match has started, that player will resolve to No. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks).
markets.title: Will Chengyiyi Yuan win the Nong vs Yuan: W15 Luan Round of 32 match?
